title: Agency Permission Template
description: Defines a category baseline permission set for OpenCode agents. Templates are the source of truth — agent files extend them with overrides.

$extends.description: Parent template(s) to inherit from. Can be a single template name (string) or an array of template names. The child template's baseline is merged on top of the parents' baselines.

oneOf.description: Multiple parent template names, merged left-to-right.

category.description: Category identifier. Must match the template filename (without .jsonc extension).

description.description: Short description of the category and its agents.

purpose.description: Detailed explanation of the category's purpose, the types of agents it covers, and what toolchains they typically use.

permValue.description: Permission action: allow (auto-approve), deny (block), or ask (prompt user).

templateDoc.description: Optional documentation metadata for generators and audit reports.

baseline_rationale.description: What the baseline provides and why these tools are included.

security_note.description: Security-relevant information about the category (e.g., tools excluded from baseline).

simplePermission.description: Full permission object for simple categories (e.g., orchestration, planning).

oneOf.description: Bash permission as a command → action map (e.g., {"*": "allow"}).

commandMap.description: Command → permission map for complex categories. Keys are command patterns (e.g., "npm *", "git status"), values are permission actions.

permission.description: Permission definition. For simple categories, this is a full permission object ({write, edit, bash}). For complex categories, this is a command → permission map.
